info.title: Who Am I ?
info.hero: I build animated, type-safe web products with a practical full-stack mindset.
info.desc: Creative full-stack web developer with {years}+ years of experience crafting front-end elegance and back-end power. I turn ideas into fast, functional, and user-friendly solutions — blending problem-solving with a designer’s eye and a thinker’s mind.

packages.title: Developer Tools
packages.body: Typed packages, CLIs, API clients, and documentation systems that help developers move faster.

dashboards.title: Product Dashboards
dashboards.body: Useful interfaces for security, realtime status, commerce, and operational workflows.

motion.title: Animated Frontends
motion.body: Interfaces with motion and personality, kept readable, responsive, and usable.

systems.title: Systems First
systems.body: I like understanding how the pieces fit before polishing the surface.

typeSafety.title: Typed And Tested
typeSafety.body: I care about contracts, runtime behavior, and the small details that prevent bugs.

experience.title: Experience Matters
experience.body: A UI should feel alive, but it should still be easy to scan, trust, and use.

fun.text1: Promise I’m not hacking you… yet.
fun.text2: Totally normal human, not an alien.
fun.text3: This is definitely not a secret lair.
fun.text4: Ignore the suspiciously large number of cats.

skills.title: My Approach
skills.desc: During my learning journey, I didn’t just learn how to build something — I learned how everything works, why it works, and that mindset is what truly matters.

detail.desc: {skill} is shown with related focus areas and projects found automatically from the project catalog.
detail.noProjects: No matching project tags yet. Add this skill to a project tag and it will appear here automatically.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.desc: A categorized look at my packages, shipped products, and personal experiments, with documentation where the work deserves a deeper developer-facing home.

packages.title: Packages
packages.body: Open-source developer packages with npm, GitHub, and dedicated documentation.

realProjects.title: Real Projects
realProjects.body: Production-minded projects built for real workflows, teams, users, or business needs.

personalProjects.title: Personal Projects
personalProjects.body: Personal builds, creative interfaces, portfolio versions, and utilities made to explore ideas or solve my own problems.
